title: How creator talent agencies are evolving into multi-platform operators
description: The legacy agency model is being re-built from the ground up to better serve the maturing creator economy – here's what that looks like.
summary_ko: 크리에이터 에이전시들이 성숙해지는 크리에이터 이코노미에 맞춰 기존 모델을 완전히 재구축하고 있습니다. 이들은 단순한 인재 관리를 넘어 멀티 플랫폼 운영자로 진화하고 있습니다. 새로운 모델은 크리에이터들의 다양한 플랫폼 활동을 통합적으로 지원합니다.
summary_en: Creator talent agencies are completely rebuilding their legacy models to better serve the maturing creator economy. They are evolving beyond simple talent management into multi-platform operators. The new model provides integrated support for creators' activities across various platforms.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 크리에이터 파트너십 전략을 재평가하고, 진화하는 에이전시 모델과의 협업 방식을 새롭게 정립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands need to reassess their creator partnership strategies and establish new collaboration methods with evolving agency models.
key_points: Creator agencies are rebuilding their business models from the ground up
Evolution from talent management to multi-platform operations
Adaptation to the maturing creator economy landscape

title: ‘The conversation has shifted’: The CFO moved upstream. Now agencies have to as well
description: One interesting side effect of marketing coming under greater scrutiny in the boardroom: CFOs are working more closely with agencies than ever before.
summary_ko: 마케팅이 이사회에서 더 큰 관심을 받으면서 CFO들이 에이전시와 이전보다 훨씬 밀접하게 협력하고 있습니다. 대화의 초점이 변화하면서 CFO가 업스트림으로 이동했습니다. 에이전시들도 이러한 변화에 맞춰 적응해야 하는 상황입니다.
summary_en: As marketing comes under greater boardroom scrutiny, CFOs are working more closely with agencies than ever before. The conversation has shifted with CFOs moving upstream in the decision-making process. Agencies must adapt to this new dynamic and collaboration model.
so_what_ko: D2C 기업들은 마케팅 의사결정에서 재무 관점의 중요성이 증가함에 따라 ROI 측정과 재무 성과 연결을 더욱 강화해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C companies must strengthen ROI measurement and financial performance connections as the financial perspective becomes increasingly important in marketing decisions.
key_points: CFOs are working more closely with agencies due to increased marketing scrutiny
The conversation has shifted with CFOs moving upstream
Agencies need to adapt to new collaboration dynamics

title: Why one brand reimbursed $10,000 to customers who paid its ‘Trump Tariff Surcharge’ last year
description: Sexual wellness company Dame is one of the first brands to proactively return money tied to President Donald Trump’s now-invalidated tariffs.
summary_ko: 성인용품 회사 Dame이 도널드 트럼프의 무효화된 관세와 관련해 고객들에게 1만 달러를 환급했습니다. 이 회사는 작년 '트럼프 관세 할증료'를 지불한 고객들에게 선제적으로 돈을 돌려준 최초의 브랜드 중 하나입니다. 이는 브랜드의 투명성과 고객 중심 접근을 보여주는 사례입니다.
summary_en: Sexual wellness company Dame reimbursed $10,000 to customers related to Donald Trump's now-invalidated tariffs. The company is one of the first brands to proactively return money to customers who paid its 'Trump Tariff Surcharge' last year. This demonstrates the brand's transparency and customer-centric approach.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 정치적 변화나 정책 변경 시 고객과의 신뢰 관계 유지를 위한 선제적 대응 전략을 마련해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should prepare proactive response strategies to maintain customer trust during political changes or policy shifts.
key_points: Dame reimbursed $10,000 to customers for invalidated Trump tariff surcharges
First brand to proactively return tariff-related payments
Demonstrates transparency and customer-centric business approach

title: Future of TV Briefing: How Paramount’s and Warner Bros. Discovery’s ad tech stacks stack up
description: This week’s Future of TV Briefing breaks down Paramount’s and Warner Bros. Discovery’s ad tech stacks now that the companies seem set (finally) to combine.
summary_ko: 이번 주 Future of TV 브리핑은 마침내 합병이 확정된 것으로 보이는 파라마운트와 워너 브라더스 디스커버리의 광고 기술 스택을 분석했습니다. 두 회사의 애드테크 스택이 어떻게 비교되는지 상세히 다뤘습니다. 합병 후 통합된 광고 기술 플랫폼의 모습을 전망했습니다.
summary_en: This week's Future of TV Briefing analyzed the ad tech stacks of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery as their merger appears finally set. The briefing detailed how the two companies' ad tech stacks compare. It forecasted the integrated advertising technology platform after the merger.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 미디어 대기업들의 통합으로 인한 광고 생태계 변화에 대비하여 광고 전략과 파트너십을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should review their advertising strategies and partnerships in preparation for ecosystem changes due to major media company consolidations.
key_points: Analysis of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery's ad tech stacks
Companies appear set to finally combine operations
Comparison of their respective advertising technology platforms

title: Omnicom Media North America CEO Ralph Pardo on integration and disintermediation
description: Ralph Pardo, CEO of Omnicom Media North America, explained how far along the holding company is in absorbing IPG's agency brands, as well as why they were kept alive.
summary_ko: 옴니컴 미디어 북미 CEO 랄프 파르도가 IPG 에이전시 브랜드 흡수 과정과 이들을 유지한 이유를 설명했습니다. 홀딩 컴퍼니의 통합과 탈중개화에 대한 입장을 밝혔습니다. IPG 브랜드들이 계속 유지되는 전략적 배경을 제시했습니다.
summary_en: Omnicom Media North America CEO Ralph Pardo explained the process of absorbing IPG agency brands and why they were kept alive. He shared his stance on holding company integration and disintermediation. Pardo provided strategic background on why IPG brands continue to be maintained.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 에이전시 통합 트렌드를 주시하며 다양한 브랜드 포트폴리오를 가진 통합 에이전시와의 협력 기회를 모색해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should monitor agency consolidation trends and explore collaboration opportunities with integrated agencies that have diverse brand portfolios.
key_points: Omnicom's progress in absorbing IPG agency brands
Strategic decision to keep IPG brands alive rather than eliminate them
Discussion of integration and disintermediation in holding companies

title: [AINews] Anthropic @ $19B ARR, Qwen team leaves, Gemini and GPT bump up fast models
summary_ko: Anthropic이 190억 달러 ARR을 기록했으며, Qwen 팀이 떠나고 Gemini와 GPT가 빠른 모델로 업그레이드되었습니다. AI 업계에서 조용한 하루였지만 주요 기업들의 성장과 변화가 계속되고 있습니다. 원문에서 구체적인 세부사항은 확인되지 않음.
summary_en: Anthropic reached $19B ARR while the Qwen team departed and Gemini and GPT upgraded to faster models. Despite being described as a quiet day in AI, major companies continue showing growth and transformation. Specific details about these developments are not confirmed in the source.
so_what_ko: AI 모델 성능 향상과 기업 재편은 D2C 브랜드의 고객 서비스와 개인화 전략에 새로운 기회를 제공할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: AI model improvements and industry reshuffling could present new opportunities for D2C brands to enhance customer service and personalization strategies.
key_points: Anthropic achieves significant $19B ARR milestone
Major AI teams experiencing organizational changes
Leading AI models getting performance upgrades

Gaming content used for audience engagement

Sports-themed puzzle content for audience engagement

Daily content format for regular engagement

title: Merrell’s first global brand platform looks to redefine the outdoors
description: The footwear brand is pitching nature as a refuge for consumers who are overwhelmed by the pace and digital demands of modern life.
summary_ko: 메렐(Merrell)이 현대인들의 디지털 피로감에 대응하여 자연을 피난처로 제시하는 첫 글로벌 브랜드 플랫폼을 론칭했습니다. 이는 빠른 속도와 디지털 요구사항에 압도된 소비자들을 타겟으로 합니다. 아웃도어 개념을 재정의하는 새로운 브랜딩 전략을 시도하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Merrell has launched its first global brand platform positioning nature as a refuge for consumers overwhelmed by modern life's pace and digital demands. The footwear brand is targeting customers experiencing digital fatigue and information overload. This represents a strategic attempt to redefine what the outdoors means in contemporary marketing.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 디지털 피로감을 겪는 소비자들에게 '디지털 디톡스'와 웰빙을 강조하는 브랜딩 전략을 고려해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should consider wellness-focused branding that addresses digital fatigue and positions their products as solutions for modern life stress.
key_points: First global brand platform launch by Merrell
Targets consumers overwhelmed by digital demands
Positions nature as refuge from modern life pace
Attempts to redefine outdoor category positioning

title: Is On’s muted guidance the sign of a ‘dwindling’ brand?
description: One analyst thinks so, though others brushed it off as the activewear brand scored 30% net sales growth in 2025 and record high Q4 margins.
summary_ko: 온(On) 브랜드가 2026년 전망을 보수적으로 제시하면서 일부 애널리스트들이 브랜드 쇠퇴 가능성을 제기했습니다. 하지만 2025년 30% 순매출 증가와 4분기 기록적 마진을 달성했습니다. 다른 전문가들은 이러한 우려를 일축하며 여전히 강력한 성장세를 보인다고 평가했습니다.
summary_en: On brand's conservative 2026 guidance prompted some analysts to question potential brand decline, though the activewear company achieved 30% net sales growth in 2025. The brand also recorded record-high Q4 margins despite the muted outlook. Other analysts dismissed decline concerns, citing continued strong performance metrics.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 보수적 전망 발표 시 시장 반응을 신중히 관리하고, 강력한 실적 데이터로 브랜드 신뢰도를 유지해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must carefully manage market communications around conservative guidance while leveraging strong performance data to maintain brand confidence.
key_points: Conservative 2026 guidance sparked analyst concerns
30% net sales growth achieved in 2025
Record high Q4 margins reported
Mixed analyst opinions on brand trajectory

title: Memory shortage looms over Best Buy’s prospects
description: Data centers are hoarding computing memory, which is poised to push up prices on consumer electronics at a time of already soft demand.
summary_ko: 베스트바이의 전망에 메모리 부족 현상이 악영향을 미치고 있습니다. 데이터센터들이 컴퓨팅 메모리를 독점하면서 소비자 전자제품 가격 상승이 예상됩니다. 이미 수요가 약한 상황에서 추가적인 가격 압박이 우려되고 있습니다.
summary_en: Memory shortages are casting a shadow over Best Buy's business prospects as data centers hoard computing memory supplies. This situation is expected to drive up consumer electronics prices at an already challenging time. The shortage comes amid already soft consumer demand for electronics products.
so_what_ko: D2C 전자제품 브랜드들은 메모리 부족으로 인한 비용 상승을 대비해 공급망 다각화와 가격 전략을 재검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C electronics brands should diversify supply chains and reassess pricing strategies to manage memory shortage-driven cost increases.
key_points: Data centers hoarding computing memory supplies
Consumer electronics price increases expected
Soft demand environment adds pressure
Supply chain disruption affecting retail prospects

title: Target’s earnings lag in the holiday quarter
description: The retailer's net sales declined again, with drops across multiple merchandise categories. However, Target expects gains during fiscal 2026 and tapped a chief brand officer.
summary_ko: 타겟의 홀리데이 분기 실적이 부진했으며 순매출이 다시 감소했습니다. 여러 상품 카테고리에서 매출 하락이 발생했습니다. 하지만 회사는 2026 회계연도 성장을 예상하며 최고 브랜드 책임자를 새로 임명했습니다.
summary_en: Target's holiday quarter earnings disappointed with declining net sales across multiple merchandise categories. The retailer experienced drops in various product segments during the critical shopping season. However, Target anticipates gains in fiscal 2026 and has appointed a new chief brand officer.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 홀리데이 시즌 실적 부진 시 브랜딩 전략 강화와 새로운 리더십 임명을 통해 회복 전략을 수립해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should strengthen branding strategies and consider leadership changes to drive recovery following poor holiday performance.
key_points: Holiday quarter net sales declined
Multiple merchandise categories showed drops
Fiscal 2026 growth expectations maintained
New chief brand officer appointed

title: Stripe’s slower view of agentic commerce
description: The processing giant, like some other digital commerce specialists, sees agent-enabled shopping evolving at a measured pace.
summary_ko: 스트라이프가 에이전틱 커머스(AI 에이전트 기반 쇼핑)의 발전 속도를 보수적으로 전망했습니다. 다른 디지털 커머스 전문업체들과 마찬가지로 점진적 발전을 예상한다고 밝혔습니다. 결제 처리 대기업으로서 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 도입에 신중한 접근을 취하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Stripe has taken a measured view on the evolution of agentic commerce, expecting agent-enabled shopping to develop at a gradual pace. The payment processing giant joins other digital commerce specialists in adopting a cautious approach to AI shopping agents. This represents a more conservative outlook on AI-driven commerce transformation.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드들은 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 도입 시 급진적 변화보다는 점진적 통합을 고려하며 실용적 접근법을 택해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands should adopt practical, gradual approaches to AI agent integration rather than rushing into rapid transformation of shopping experiences.
key_points: Stripe expects measured pace for agentic commerce
Digital commerce specialists taking cautious approach
AI shopping agents evolving gradually
Conservative outlook on commerce transformation
